Description: Using emoji characters as functional UI icons
Do: Use SVG icons from Heroicons Lucide or Simple Icons
Don't: Use emoji like 🎨 🚀 ⚙️ as UI icons

Description: Hover states that cause elements to shift position
Don't: Use scale transforms that shift layout

Do: Use fixed viewBox (24x24) with consistent sizing
Add cursor-pointer to all clickable elements
Don't: Leave default cursor on interactive elements
Instant state changes or too slow (>500ms)

Description: Text with insufficient contrast in light mode
Do: Use slate-900 for body text slate-600 for muted
Don't: Use gray-400 or lighter for body text

Description: Glass effects too transparent in light mode
Borders not visible in light mode

Do: Account for fixed navbar height with padding
Don't: Let content hide behind fixed elements

Do: Add meaningful alt text to all images
Don't: Leave alt empty or use filename
